utility_evaluation.REASONING:
First, count the number of items in the required format: 1) health_coverage: physical and mental health insurance with costs, 2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs, 3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs, 4) additional_services: any enhancement services with costs, 5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown — so total = 5 items. Now check the final coverage plan: 
1) health_coverage: includes 'physical_health' with name and cost €210/month and 'mental_health' with name and cost €130/month — fully specified with costs. ✅
2) property_coverage: 'EliteHome Premium Coverage (€95/month)' — includes cost and description — fully specified. ✅
3) travel_coverage: 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan (€115/month)' — includes cost and description — fully specified. ✅
4) additional_services: list of enhancements but **no costs provided** for each additional service — requirement says 'with costs', so this is not fully specified. ❌
5) total_budget: contains current, optimized, and savings per month — monthly breakdown given, but no annual cost breakdown (requirement says complete monthly/annual cost breakdown) — missing annual figures, so not fully specified. ❌
Therefore, 3 items out of 5 are fully specified.
